summary: Enlarge an image with left/right/top/bottom margins filled per a boundary mode (constant/clamp/mirror/wrap); negative margins crop that side.

outputs.name: image
outputs.doc: The padded image (extent grown by the margins; all other descriptor fields preserved).

params.name: left
params.doc: Pixels to add on the left (negative crops).

params.name: right
params.doc: Pixels to add on the right (negative crops).

params.name: top
params.doc: Pixels to add on the top (negative crops).

params.name: bottom
params.doc: Pixels to add on the bottom (negative crops).

params.name: mode
params.doc: How border samples are synthesized from the input edge.

params.name: value
params.doc: Per-channel constant fill for `constant` mode; defaults to all-zero.

perceptual.reason: image.pad copies the interior verbatim and synthesizes borders by exact clamp/mirror/wrap/constant rules; correctness is verified by per-mode boundary fixtures and the crop/pad round-trip identity, not a perceptual-quality metric
